
---
title: "Which Came First: Consciousness or Life?"
author: "Arash Kanani"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
site: bookdown::bookdown_site
documentclass: book
bibliography: [references.bib]
biblio-style: apalike
link-citations: yes
description: "Exploring scientific, philosophical, and metaphysical theories on whether consciousness emerged from life — or preceded it."
---

# Preface {-}

This book explores one of the deepest interdisciplinary questions:

> Did consciousness emerge from life, or did consciousness in some form precede biological life itself?

The discussion spans biology, neuroscience, philosophy, complexity science, artificial intelligence, physics, and metaphysical traditions.

# Introduction

This project aims to critically compare competing perspectives on:
- the nature of life
- the nature of consciousness
- emergence and complexity
- scientific and philosophical explanations
- consciousness-first and life-first frameworks
